name: Dashboard Pro Performance Workstation
focus: high-performance candle replay, persistent chart viewport, professional dashboard ergonomics
performance_changes: Adaptive WebSocket frame scheduling based on replay speed and tab visibility
Multiple transport frames merged into one React state transition
Incremental candle updates instead of full series replacement
Incremental strategy indicator updates with bounded point retention
Fast ordered append path for replay bars
Sequence-based deduplication and safe overlap handling
Periodic chart compaction instead of per-frame rebuilding
Memoized high-frequency dashboard boundaries and stable callbacks
Extrema-preserving downsampling for large analytics curves
Iterative finite extent calculation without large-array argument spreading
Content visibility and bounded table windows for lower layout cost
resolved_issues: Visible data disappearing after browser retention was reached
Viewport scale drifting or resetting during replay
Unbounded analytics SVG paths on long runs
Schema drift previously reported by the Windows quality gate
limitations: The simulator remains OHLC candle-level and cannot reconstruct historical intrabar tick order.
Docker Engine was not available inside the artifact build container, so final Docker runtime execution must be repeated on Docker Desktop.
Actual frame rate depends on browser, GPU acceleration, display refresh rate, strategy drawing volume, and replay speed.
